scored_edges.keep_rationale: 3D datasets and AI+geometry task space provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Multi-view and voxel-based 3D deep learning; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
